subcodes.first_line: In this day doth He Who conversed upon Sinai speak forth within the Kingdom of utterance, summoning all humanity unto the straight path and the Most Great Announcement [3.5s]... ...Your letter was sent to the Supreme Threshold by Afnan on whom be My glory. The youth mentioned therein attained Our presence.  Although this Wronged One had not consorted for many years past with people from foreign lands, We received him on several occasions. Portents of sincerity could be discerned on his visage.
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز مکلم طور در ملکوت بیان ناطق و کل را بصراط مستقیم و نباء عظیم دعوت میفرماید
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @blind imitation [taqlid], @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
